TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mswati_III, title = Mswati_III, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mswati_III} }

S.FORM: Mswati III I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mswati III, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Swaziland anini i ci Mswati III, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mswati iii i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mswati iii, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u swa*i…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i mswati iii, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Mswati III I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 19 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mswati III, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Swaziland anini i ci Mswati III, patirengan a romi'ad i 1986 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mswati iii i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mswati iii, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u swa*i…ĺan…¨~…ģ anini i ¶i mswati iii, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
